title: Administration
subtitle: Admins only: registration and audit trail
regDesc: When off, self-service signup is blocked (including OIDC-first users).
usersDesc: Reset passwords, enable or disable accounts
addUserDesc: Create a local account (a personal ledger is created automatically)
passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
newPasswordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters
pwdResetPrompt: Set a new password for {{username}} (min 6 characters)
resetPwdModalDesc: This immediately replaces the user's login password.
resetPwdTypeLabel: Type the username again to confirm
resetPwdAckLabel: I understand this will reset this user's password
resetPwdMismatch: The two new passwords do not match
resetPwdUsernameMismatch: Typed username does not match the target user
resetPwdMustAck: Please check the confirmation box before submitting
